song.title: Jesus What a Friend for Sinners
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Jesus! what a Friend for sinners! Jesus! Lover of my soul; Friends may fail me, foes assail me, He, my Savior, makes me whole.
[C] Chorus Hallelujah! what a Savior! Hallelujah! what a Friend! Saving, helping, keeping, loving, He is with me to the end.
[V2] 2) Jesus! what a Strength in weakness! Let me hide myself in Him; Tempted, tried, and sometimes failing, He, my Strength, my vict’ry wins.
[V3] 3) Jesus! what a Help in sorrow! While the billows o’er me roll, Even when my heart is breaking, He, my Comfort, helps my soul.
[V4] 4) Jesus what a Guide and Keeper! While the tempest still is high, Storms about me, night o’ertakes me, He, my Pilot, hears my cry.
[V5] 5) Jesus! I do now receive Him, More than all in Him I find; He hath granted me forgiveness, I am His, and He is mine.
song.author: J. Wilbur Chapman
